title: Balanced Binary Tree

hints: Use recursive approach to calculate height of each subtree.
For each node, calculate height of left and right subtrees.
Check if the absolute difference between left and right subtree heights is more than 1.
If difference > 1 for any node, the tree is not balanced.
Return -1 for null nodes (or 0 depending on your height calculation).
Use a flag or return value to track if tree is balanced during traversal.
